2.dv: from the prefix k and H1931 (הוּא);

3.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)

3.gl: a noise, tumult, crowd; also disquietude, wealth
3.kj: abundance, company, many, multitude, multiply, noise, riches, rumbling, sounding, store, tumult.

3.gl: a vehicle; by implication, a team; by extension, cavalry; by analogy a rider, i.e. the upper millstone
3.kj: chariot, (upper) millstone, multitude (from the margin), wagon.

4.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

4.gl: to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces)

4.gl: properly, to be burly, i.e. (figuratively) powerful (passively, impregnable); by implication, to ravage
4.kj: dead, destroy(-er), oppress, robber, spoil(-er), [idiom] utterly, (lay) waste.

4.gl: Caphtor (i.e. a wreath-shaped island), the original seat of the Philistines

5.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)

5.gl: properly, extent (of time); but used only adverbially (especially with other particle prefixes), when (either relative or interrogative)
5.dv: from an unused root meaning to extend;

5.gl: to crowd; also to gash (as if by pressing into)
5.kj: assemble (selves by troops), gather (selves together, self in troops), cut selves.

5.gl: to be dumb or silent; hence, to fail or perish; trans. to destroy
5.kj: cease, be cut down (off), destroy, be brought to silence, be undone, [idiom] utterly.

5.gl: a remainder or residual (surviving, final) portion
5.kj: that had escaped, be left, posterity, remain(-der), remnant, residue, rest.
dale, vale, valley (often used as a part of proper names). See also H1025 (בֵּית הָעֵמֶק).

6.gl: to gather for any purpose; hence, to receive, take away, i.e. remove (destroy, leave behind, put up, restore, etc.)
6.kj: assemble, bring, consume, destroy, felch, gather (in, together, up again), [idiom] generally, get (him), lose, put all together, receive, recover (another from leprosy), (be) rerew

6.gl: properly, to toss violently and suddenly (the sea with waves, the skin with boils); figuratively (in a favorable manner) to settle, i.e. quiet; specifically, to wink (from the motion of the eye-lids)
6.kj: break, divide, find ease, be a moment, (cause, give, make to) rest, make suddenly.

6.gl: to be dumb; by implication, to be astonished, to stop; also to perish
6.kj: cease, be cut down (off), forbear, hold peace, quiet self, rest, be silent, keep (put to) silence, be (stand) still, tarry, wait.

6.gl: drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
6.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.
appease, idleness, (at, be at, be in, give) quiet(-ness), (be at, be in, give, have, take) rest, settle, be still.

6.gl: where?; hence, whither?, when?; also hither and thither

7.gl: to fix upon (by agreement or appointment); by implication, to meet (at a stated time), to summon (to trial), to direct (in a certain quarter or position), to engage (for marriage)
7.kj: agree,(maxke an) appoint(-ment, a time), assemble (selves), betroth, gather (selves, together), meet (together), set (a time).

7.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
7.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

7.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
7.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
7.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

7.kj: appoint, (for-) bid, (give a) charge, (give a, give in, send with) command(-er, -ment), send a messenger, put, (set) in order.
appease, idleness, (at, be at, be in, give) quiet(-ness), (be at, be in, give, have, take) rest, settle, be still.

7.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
7.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
